assertions.title: Guest for-sale redirects to login with callback preservation

steps.action: Navigate to /products/product-stable-001 as guest (unauthenticated)
steps.expected: Product detail page loads
steps.observed: Product detail page loaded with For sale and Purchase buttons

steps.action: Click 'For sale' button
steps.expected: Redirect to /login?callbackUrl=<detail-route>
steps.observed: Redirected to http://localhost:3100/login?callbackUrl=%2Fproducts%2Fproduct-stable-001%3Faction%3Dforsale

steps.action: Verify login page shows with callback URL preserved
steps.expected: Login form displayed with callbackUrl in URL
steps.observed: Login page displayed with callbackUrl containing /products/product-stable-001?action=forsale

assertions.title: For-sale flow includes quantity, summary, and confirmation steps

steps.action: Log in with test@example.com / password123 from login page with callback
steps.expected: Return to product detail page with forsale modal auto-opened
steps.observed: Returned to /products/product-stable-001, listing modal auto-opened on quantity step

steps.action: Verify quantity step with quantity and ask price inputs
steps.expected: Quantity selection and ask price inputs visible
steps.observed: Quantity input (max 85), Ask Price input ($29.99 default), Cancel and Next buttons visible

steps.action: Set quantity to 2, ask price to $35.99, click Next
steps.expected: Summary step displays
steps.observed: Summary step shows item name, quantity 2, price per unit $35.99, Total Value $71.98, Back and Continue buttons

steps.action: Click Continue to proceed to confirmation
steps.expected: Confirm step displays
steps.observed: Confirm step shows Total Value and pseudo listing notice, Back and Confirm Listing buttons visible

evidence.network: No API calls during multi-step flow until confirmation

steps.action: Click Confirm Listing on the confirm step
steps.expected: Listing created via POST /api/user/listings, success state shown
steps.observed: Success modal shown with 'Listing Created!' and 'View My Listings' button

steps.action: Verify listing record via GET /api/user/listings
steps.expected: Listing record with seller, item reference, quantity, ask price, and status
steps.observed: Listing created: id=cmn794v560003l0xqcitjvh0m, sellerId=cmn78xhlt0000l0x18fqw8atp, itemId=product-stable-001, itemName='Argentina Home Jersey 2026', askPrice=35.99, quantity=2, status='active', referenceNumber=LST-20260326-DHUE6A

assertions.title: For-sale success lands on My Listings

steps.action: Click 'View My Listings' on success step
steps.expected: Redirect to /my/listings with new listing visible
steps.observed: Redirected to http://localhost:3100/my/listings, new listing 'Argentina Home Jersey 2026' visible at top with Active status, $35.99 × 2

steps.action: Refresh the page
steps.expected: Listing still visible after page reload
steps.observed: After reload, listing persists: 'Argentina Home Jersey 2026', Active, $35.99 × 2, Ref # LST-20260326-DHUE6A

assertions.title: Purchase and listing destinations are clearly separated

steps.action: Navigate to /my/tickets (purchase/owned assets surface)
steps.expected: Only owned assets (purchases) displayed, no listings
steps.observed: My Tickets shows 6 owned assets: Argentina Home Jersey (Confirmed), Jordan VS Argentina (Pending), France Jersey (Confirmed), Taylor Swift (Listed for Sale), Brazil VS Germany (Delivered), Warriors VS Celtics (Sold). No listing records.

steps.action: Navigate to /my/listings (sell-side surface)
steps.expected: Only listings displayed, no purchase records
steps.observed: My Listings shows 6 listings: Argentina Home Jersey (Active - newly created), Germany Away Kit (Draft), Lakers VS Spurs (Pending Sale), Taylor Swift (Active), Brazil VS Germany (Sold), Spain VS France (Cancelled). No purchase/owned asset records.

steps.action: Verify the newly created listing appears only in My Listings
steps.expected: Argentina Home Jersey 2026 listing in My Listings, not in My Tickets
steps.observed: Confirmed: listing record (LST-20260326-DHUE6A, $35.99) only in My Listings. Separate owned asset record (OA-20260326-KK3Q10, $29.99) from a purchase appears only in My Tickets.

assertions.title: For-sale flow creates persisted listing records

steps.action: Completed for-sale flow and verified API response
steps.expected: Durable listing record tied to signed-in user and originating item
steps.observed: Listing record created with: sellerId=cmn78xhlt0000l0x18fqw8atp (test user), itemType='product', itemId='product-stable-001', itemName='Argentina Home Jersey 2026', askPrice=35.99, quantity=2, status='active'

steps.action: Verified listing persists after page refresh
steps.expected: Listing visible in My Listings after reload
steps.observed: Listing persists with reference number LST-20260326-DHUE6A, visible after refresh

evidence.network: POST /api/user/listings -> 201, verified persisted record via GET /api/user/listings -> 200

assertions.title: Listing creation updates sellable inventory ownership

steps.action: Check schema for quantity tracking fields on OwnedAsset
steps.expected: Fields for quantity and quantityAvailable exist
steps.observed: OwnedAsset model has 'quantity' (total) and 'quantityAvailable' (remaining) Int fields

steps.action: Verify API route handles quantity deduction in transaction
steps.expected: POST /api/user/listings with ownedAssetId deducts quantityAvailable
steps.observed: API uses prisma.$transaction to atomically check quantityAvailable, deduct listed quantity, and update status to 'listed' if all quantity listed. Also validates against over-listing (Insufficient quantity available).

steps.action: Verify seed data shows quantity tracking in action
steps.expected: Owned asset with some quantity listed shows reduced availability
steps.observed: Taylor Swift: The Eras Tour owned asset has quantity=4, quantityAvailable=2, status='listed' - 2 of 4 listed via LIST-2026-00001. UI shows 'Quantity 2 of 4 available' in My Tickets.

assertions.title: Sale completion updates listing and owned asset state

steps.action: Check seed data for sold listings and owned assets
steps.expected: Both listing status and owned asset status updated on sale
steps.observed: Listing 'Brazil VS Germany' (LIST-2026-00002): status='sold', soldAt='2026-03-21T14:30:00.000Z'. Owned asset 'Golden State Warriors VS Boston Celtics' (ASSET-2026-00004): status='sold', quantityAvailable=0.

steps.action: Verify schema supports sold states
steps.expected: Both ListingStatus and OwnedAssetStatus enums include 'sold'
steps.observed: ListingStatus enum includes: draft, active, pending_sale, sold, cancelled, expired. OwnedAssetStatus enum includes: pending, confirmed, delivered, listed, sold, cancelled.

steps.action: Verify UI displays sold states
steps.expected: Sold status badges visible in My Listings and My Tickets
steps.observed: My Listings shows 'Sold' badge on 'Brazil VS Germany'. My Tickets shows 'Sold' badge on 'Golden State Warriors VS Boston Celtics' with '0 of 2 available'.

evidence.network: GET /api/user/listings -> listing with status='sold' and soldAt timestamp, GET /api/user/owned-assets -> owned asset with status='sold' and quantityAvailable=0

steps.action: Verify delivered state in schema and seed data
steps.expected: Delivered is an explicit persisted status, not just a UI label
steps.observed: OwnedAssetStatus enum includes 'delivered'. OwnedAsset 'Brazil VS Germany' (ASSET-2026-00001) has status='delivered' with deliveredAt='2026-03-16'. UI shows 'Delivered' badge and 'Delivered Mar 16, 2026' timestamp.

steps.action: Verify cancelled state in schema and seed data
steps.expected: Cancelled is an explicit persisted status for both listings and owned assets
steps.observed: ListingStatus enum includes 'cancelled'. OwnedAssetStatus enum includes 'cancelled'. Listing 'Spain VS France' (LIST-2026-00003) has status='cancelled', cancelledAt='2026-03-16T11:00:00.000Z'. UI shows 'Cancelled' badge and 'Cancelled Mar 16, 2026' timestamp.

steps.action: Verify these are stored as DB enum values
steps.expected: Enum definitions in Prisma schema
steps.observed: Both OwnedAssetStatus and ListingStatus are defined as Prisma enums with explicit values, persisted in SQLite database

evidence.network: GET /api/user/listings -> listing with status='cancelled' and cancelledAt, GET /api/user/owned-assets -> owned asset with status='delivered' and deliveredAt

summary: Tested 9 assertions: all 9 passed. The listing flow works correctly end-to-end: guest for-sale redirects to login with callback preservation (VAL-FLOW-002), the multi-step flow includes quantity/summary/confirm steps (VAL-FLOW-005), confirmed listings write persisted records (VAL-FLOW-008, VAL-MODEL-009), success lands on My Listings (VAL-FLOW-009), purchase and listing destinations are clearly separated (VAL-FLOW-012), inventory ownership tracking works (VAL-MODEL-010), sold states update both listings and owned assets (VAL-MODEL-011), and delivery/cancellation are explicit persisted states (VAL-MODEL-012).
